calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-10-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Petitioner: Johnny B. Hall Wright, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Yusufu Bomani Caungula.
Decree signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-27-2006 Reset To Aug-10-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-01-2006 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-23-2006 Reset To Jun-01-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Jacqueline Chan.
Petitioner: Johnny B'Hall Wright, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
Without Proof of Publication, matter is continued to June 1, 2006 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
